mentions.note: Up 108% in 2025 despite flatness past months; mobile game developer platform, revenue tripled in 4 years, EPS $9.37 (2024 ~$4), Wall Street looks for 37% rev growth, 56% EPS growth. No visible competitor. Business speculative appearance but fundamentals solid.
January's worst performer, down ~30%, then plunged 70% last Friday on Google's Project Genie (AI platform for building games). P/E compressed 42x → 32x forward. Never compete vs Google.
Caller Randy: AI-driven ad platform too risky. Fear Google competition like Trade Desk experience. Margins so good, uncertainty high.
Software/mobile marketing platform caught in sector rotation; down 3%.
